mnemonics: Vanishing gradients make weights VAGUE, like a distant radio signal fading out.
keyPoints: Vanishing Gradients: Gradients become extremely small, halting learning in early layers.
Exploding Gradients: Gradients become extremely large, causing unstable updates and NaN values.
Local Minima & Saddle Points: The optimizer gets stuck in suboptimal regions of the loss landscape.
commonMistakes: Using Sigmoid/Tanh activation functions which exacerbate the vanishing gradient problem.
Not using Gradient Clipping to mitigate exploding gradients in recurrent networks.
Using a fixed, poorly chosen learning rate instead of adaptive optimizers like Adam or RMSprop.
